page_metadata.biotools__summary: R package that performs analyses of expression evolution from RNA-seq data, including optimized input formatting, normalization and pair-wise distance evaluation, expression character tree inference and preliminary phylogenetic network analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: R package that performs analyses of expression evolution from RNA-seq data, including optimized input formatting, normalization and pair-wise distance evaluation, expression character tree inference and preliminary phylogenetic network analysis.
